Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Quindle Data Systems Ltd and equity placing by Rambleworth Financial plc (UK issuer, AXE Main Market).
Structure: acquisition of Quindle Data Systems Ltd for £84m (cash) funded by accelerated bookbuild placing of new ordinary shares at 212–218 pence; placing size c. £60m; vendor loan note £24m.

Conditions: shareholder authorities for the placing; customary warranties; no MAC condition shall apply to completion of the acquisition or the placing; target’s business does not require UK financial services authorisation.

Use of proceeds: fund acquisition consideration and integration; any surplus to be applied to regulatory capital buffer at the group service company (no change to remuneration policy or employee benefits at completion).
Employment: no immediate redundancies envisaged; consult employee reps at Quindle in line with UK practice; TUPE analysis indicates no automatic transfer for contractors (public guidance referenced).

must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Quindle Data Systems Ltd and equity placing by Rambleworth Financial plc (UK issuer, AXE Main Market).
Parties: Rambleworth Financial plc (issuer) and Oakmere Capital Partners LLP (bookrunner); contacts: Ms. Eleri Quinn, CFO, eleri.quinn@rambleworth-fin.co.uk; Sir Bramley Dawes (Chair); bookrunner desk: deals@oakmerecap.uk; switchboard +44 7000 123456.
Project code: pr0j-ect SE  A  L; Internal ref: RWF-  6 2 -QDS; pseudo‑ISIN: ZZ00‑RWF‑PL1234; data room http://vault.northdesk.io/d?r=NX- 41 09 &k=af7c%2D x9 (copy spaces exactly).
Structure: acquisition of Quindle Data Systems Ltd for £84m (cash) funded by accelerated bookbuild placing of new ordinary shares at 212–218 pence; placing size c. £60m; vendor loan note £24m.
Status: inside information under UK MAR Article 17 until announcement; select investors may be wall‑crossed under market sounding protocols, with insider lists maintained and cleansed on pricing.
Disclosure: intention to conduct ABB to be announced via AXE RNS after market close; pricing and final terms to be released by 7:00 a.m. (UK time) the following business day or sooner if a leak requires an earlier cleansing announcement.
Share dealing code applies; closed period from 30 days before interim results—PDMRs are restricted and may not participate; exemption requests to Compliance may be considered but are unlikely to be granted.
Issuer‑relative materiality: management considers EPS accretion >5% and net leverage moving above 2.0x as likely material; preliminary synergy case (non‑public) implies 6–8% FY27 EPS uplift.
Conditions: shareholder authorities for the placing; customary warranties; no MAC condition shall apply to completion of the acquisition or the placing; target’s business does not require UK financial services authorisation.
Use of proceeds: fund acquisition consideration and integration; any surplus to be applied to regulatory capital buffer at the group service company (no change to remuneration policy or employee benefits at completion).
Public references: as disclosed via AXE‑RNS on 03 May 2026 (RWF: “Strategic Options Review”), the Board commenced a review; this term sheet contains more specific, non‑public pricing and synergy assumptions.
Employment: no immediate redundancies envisaged; consult employee reps at Quindle in line with UK practice; TUPE analysis indicates no automatic transfer for contractors (public guidance referenced).
